title: Weighted K-Nearest Neighbor Classification Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of classifying a new data point using the Weighted K-NN algorithm, highlighting how closer neighbors contribute more to the final prediction.
relationships: The algorithm calculates the distance from the Query Point to all points in the Training Dataset, identifies the K Nearest Neighbors, assigns a weight to each neighbor's vote based on its distance, tallies the weighted votes, and finally assigns the Predicted Class Label based on the highest tally.
